name: auto-refresh: --token-budget caps total tokens spent across all source refreshes; exceeding budget halts further refreshes and logs
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && for id in s1 s2 s3 s4 s5; do echo "2026-05-11T00:00:00Z" > ".claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/$id.txt"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --token-budget 100 --tokens-per-fetch 50 --report 2>out.txt && grep "budget exhausted" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
